sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104271" key="to/nios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τόν-ιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg.: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τόνια, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n104271.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">'tractor' machines,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:2:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.2.1</biblScope></bibl>, al.; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τονία, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rope of a pulley,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:10:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
